description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on every push and pull request. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs: one for sanity tests with a matrix of Python 3.8 and Ansible versions 2.9.* and 2.10.0b1, and another for building a collection with Python 3.8 and Ansible. In each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, and run specific commands.
